metadata.description: Unified consumable naming system with enhanced effects and trait support (v4.2 - Hybrid Enhancement System)
notes: All components have rarityWeight for emergent rarity calculation
Traits define actual gameplay effects (healing power, duration, buffs, etc.)
Trait merging: numbers take highest, strings take last, booleans use OR
Patterns should use component tokens for name generation
Enchantments can be added to patterns using component tokens or references
metadata.usage: Pattern-based name generation for consumables. Pick components by rarityWeight and apply patterns to generate procedural names with trait stacking.
